metadata.description: A person appearing in their 40s-50s with feminine presentation has olive skin with some fine lines around the eyes and forehead. Their face is oval with a defined jawline. Dark, short, wavy hair is styled in a bob, with a natural hairline. The eyes are bright blue and almond-shaped, set moderately wide apart. Eyebrows are medium thickness and arched. The nose has a straight bridge and a slightly rounded tip. Lips are medium thickness with a natural shape. There are no prominent distinguishing features. The person appears to have features often associated with Mediterranean or Middle Eastern ancestry. They have a neutral expression, looking directly at the viewer with their head held straight.
